1.1.1: Added complete reason_codes registry (DCC/MCC) with descriptions and ledger fields
Formalized validator_contracts section with strict Pass 1/2 responsibilities
Added execution_order specification (PARSE → CEILING → MINIMUM → HNODE → DAY_ROLE_CAP → MCC_DOWNGRADE → LEDGER_WRITE)
Replaced 'silent clamp' with auditable MCC_TEMPO_ESCALATION_CLAMPED_TO_H3 reason code
Added day_role_cap_enforcement section with rule, failure actions by readiness, and Framework v2.1 dependency
Extended mcc_integration with allowed restriction types, deterministic downgrade sequence, and exact transformations
Added eccentric_minimum rules (class-based enforcement for non-ballistic ECICT)
Restricted X to C position only (removed from IT to eliminate semantic ambiguity)
Normalized H-nodes to numeric representation (H0=0, H1=1, H2=2, H3=3) with rendering rule
Added explicit TUT computation rule: TUT = E + IB + IT + C (C=X treated as 0)
1.1.2: Applied TEMPO_GOVERNANCE_PATCH_PACK_v1.1.2 (PATCH_001–PATCH_005) to close enforcement gaps in v1.1.1
Aligned day-role cap naming to day_role_h_node_max (prevents node vs H-node collision)
Inserted Pass 1B (TEMPO_STRUCTURAL_SAFETY) into validator pass semantics (LAW-mode)
Added downgrade revalidation guard (downgrade cannot create Pass 1B violations)
Added whitelist tempo_class taxonomy requirement (or explicit mapping) for eccentric minimum enforcement
Appended reason-code registry entries for tempo codes (for integration into global reason_codes.json)

description: Canonical authority for tempo prescription, enforcement, and fatigue modulation in EFL adult_physique training programs. v1.1.1 is production-ready with complete validator contracts, reason code registry, and deterministic downgrade rules.

authority_hierarchy.principle: Tempo Governance operates UNDER DCC-Physique v1.2 authority. Tempo rules may REJECT a DCC-legal prescription if ceilings are exceeded, but cannot LEGALIZE an otherwise illegal prescription.
cascade: 2. Tempo Governance v1.1.1 (structural safety: tempo ceilings, H-node modulation, eccentric minimums)
3. MCC v1.0 (accumulation control: TUT limits, tempo downgrade integration)

conflict_resolution.principle: Higher authority cannot be overridden by lower layers.

IT.name: Isometric Top
IT.note: X not allowed in IT v1.1.1

C.name: Concentric
C.x_meaning: Explosive concentric; treated as 0s for TUT

tut_calculation.c_effective: If C=X then C_effective = 0, else C_effective = C

parsing_rules.X_treatment: Valid only in C position; treated as 0 seconds for arithmetic
parsing_rules.X_position_rule: If 'X' appears in IT or any non-C position => reject (DCC_TEMPO_X_IN_INVALID_POSITION)

h_node_modulation.h_node_numeric: H0=0, H1=1, H2=2, H3=3 (internal); render as 'H{n}' for humans

tempo_modifier_table.exhaustiveness: All E values partitioned; each ISO_total checked; no gaps or overlaps

eccentric_minimum_rules.purpose: Prevent unsafe zero-eccentric prescriptions for non-ballistic exercises

mapping_fallback.note: Preferred: explicit tempo_class per exercise in whitelist v1.0.3+. Fallback mapping is provided for transitional compatibility.

eccentric_minimum_rules.enforcement: Pass 1B (TEMPO_STRUCTURAL_SAFETY): if E < class minimum and not a ballistic exception => REJECT (DCC_TEMPO_E_BELOW_MINIMUM)

tempo_mode.N/A_DURATION: Holds; skip tempo validation, use duration field

explosive_concentric_treatment.h_node: X in C does NOT elevate h_node (modifier from E + pauses only)

legality_gate.enforcement: If tempo contains C=X and explosive_concentric_allowed=false => REJECT (DCC_TEMPO_EXPLOSIVE_NOT_ALLOWED_FOR_EXERCISE). If X appears outside C => REJECT (DCC_TEMPO_X_IN_INVALID_POSITION).

reason_codes.purpose: Formal registry of all codes emitted by validators

dcc_codes.DCC_TEMPO_FORMAT_INVALID: Tempo does not parse as E:IB:IT:C
dcc_codes.DCC_TEMPO_E_BELOW_MINIMUM: E < exercise eccentric_minimum AND not (explosive_concentric_allowed=True AND C=X)
dcc_codes.DCC_TEMPO_X_IN_INVALID_POSITION: X in IT or other non-C position

mcc_codes.MCC_TEMPO_ESCALATION_CLAMPED_TO_H3: h_effective > 3, tempo_can_escalate=False; clamped with reason code emitted (auditable)
mcc_codes.MCC_TEMPO_DOWNGRADE_CHAIN_EXHAUSTED: Cannot downgrade further; exercise swap required

info_codes.TEMPO_MODIFIED_BY_MCC: DCC-valid tempo modified by MCC context

validator_contracts.purpose: Formal validator specs with input/output contracts

pass_1_dcc.name: DCC Pass 1: Structural Safety & Format
pass_1_dcc.responsibility: Reject prescriptions violating format, ceilings, minimums, or explosive gate
steps: If tempo_mode != ECICT: return PASS (skip all checks)
Parse E:IB:IT:C; if invalid → REJECT DCC_TEMPO_FORMAT_INVALID
If X in IT or non-C position → REJECT DCC_TEMPO_X_IN_INVALID_POSITION
If E > eccentric_max → REJECT DCC_TEMPO_E_EXCEEDS_CEILING (same for IB, IT)
If E < eccentric_minimum AND NOT (explosive_concentric_allowed=True AND C=X) → REJECT DCC_TEMPO_E_BELOW_MINIMUM
All checks pass → PASS_DCC_1, proceed to Pass 2
pass_1_dcc.output: PASS or REJECT with reason_code; parsed E,IB,IT,C

pass_2_mcc.name: MCC Pass 2: H-Node Modulation & Accumulation Control
pass_2_mcc.responsibility: Compute h_node, apply gates, enforce day-role caps, execute downgrade, emit reason codes
steps: TUT_per_rep = E + IB + IT + (0 if C=X else C)
All constraints satisfied → final_tempo (original or downgraded)
Write ledger: final tempo, reason_codes, original/modified, h_numeric + h_render
pass_2_mcc.output: PASS or REJECT or DOWNGRADED; h_numeric, h_render, final_tempo, tut_per_rep, tut_total, reason_codes

failure_action.GREEN: REJECT (MCC_TEMPO_DOWNGRADE_CHAIN_EXHAUSTED if cannot satisfy via tempo downgrade)
failure_action.YELLOW: Attempt deterministic downgrade; if exhausted => REJECT/ESCALATE per MCC policy
failure_action.RED: Restrict further: downgrade or exercise swap required

mcc_integration.principle: Tempo is a constraint variable MCC can downgrade (reduce). ONLY downgrade method for tempo.

deterministic_downgrade_sequence.purpose: Apply transformations in strict order to preserve movement quality if tempo must be reduced
deterministic_downgrade_sequence.step_1: REDUCE_PAUSE_IT: If IT > 0, decrement IT by 1; recalculate ISO_total, h_node, TUT. Repeat while IT > 0 and constraints violated.
deterministic_downgrade_sequence.step_2: REDUCE_PAUSE_IB: If IB > 0, decrement IB by 1; recalculate. Repeat while IB > 0 and constraints violated.
deterministic_downgrade_sequence.step_3: REDUCE_ECCENTRIC: If E > eccentric_minimum, decrement E by 1; recalculate. Repeat while E > eccentric_minimum and constraints violated.
deterministic_downgrade_sequence.step_4: ENABLE_EXPLOSIVE: If explosive_concentric_allowed=True AND C != X, set C=X; recalculate TUT (C=0 for arithmetic). Note: Does NOT change h_node. Execute once.
deterministic_downgrade_sequence.step_5: DOWNGRADE_EXHAUSTED: If after steps 1-4 constraints still violated, emit MCC_TEMPO_DOWNGRADE_CHAIN_EXHAUSTED. Exercise swap required.

test_cases: Standard (3:1:1:0) on PRIMARY: passes DCC, no downgrade if within caps
E=0 on ACCESSORY: DCC rejects unless ballistic exception
E=5 with ISO_total=3: modifier=+2, h_node computed correctly
X in IT: DCC rejects (invalid position)
X in C on non-explosive: DCC rejects
h_effective=4 on DAY_A (cap=2): downgrade chain executed, final h_node<=2
Escalation with opt_in=True, tempo_can_escalate=True: h_node allowed >3

pass_0.name: PARSE
responsibilities: Reject malformed input before law enforcement

pass_1a.name: DCC_LEGALITY
responsibilities: Reject illegal exercise prescriptions per DCC

pass_1b.name: TEMPO_STRUCTURAL_SAFETY
responsibilities: Validate tempo ceilings (E, IB, IT max per exercise)

pass_2.name: MCC_MODULATION
responsibilities: Apply escalation policy gate (approve / clamp with audit / reject)
Compute TUT and enforce MCC TUT ceilings
Execute deterministic tempo downgrade with revalidation
Write final prescription + reason codes to ledger

pass_3.name: ADVISORY
responsibilities: Emit explanatory notes and advisory codes (non-binding)

deterministic_downgrade_sequence.goal: Reduce tempo-derived magnitude (H-node/TUT) without violating Pass 1B structural safety constraints.

steps.name: REDUCE_PAUSE_IT
steps.action: While IT > 0 and constraints violated: IT -= 1; recompute ISO_total, h_node_effective, TUT

steps.name: REDUCE_PAUSE_IB
steps.action: While IB > 0 and constraints violated: IB -= 1; recompute ISO_total, h_node_effective, TUT

steps.name: REDUCE_ECCENTRIC
steps.action: While E > eccentric_minimum and constraints violated: E -= 1; recompute modifier, h_node_effective, TUT

steps.name: ENABLE_EXPLOSIVE_CONCENTRIC
steps.action: If explosive_concentric_allowed=true and C != X: set C = X (treat as 0s for TUT)

steps.name: DOWNGRADE_EXHAUSTED
steps.action: If constraints still violated after steps 1-4 => emit MCC_TEMPO_DOWNGRADE_CHAIN_EXHAUSTED and require exercise swap.

revalidation_contract.rule: After each transformation, re-run the subset of Pass 1B checks relevant to the modified field.
revalidation_contract.failure_action: Stop immediately and emit MCC_TEMPO_DOWNGRADE_REVALIDATION_FAILED with violated_constraint.

entries.description: Tempo string does not parse as E:IB:IT:C
Eccentric duration E exceeds exercise-specific eccentric_max
Isometric bottom IB exceeds exercise-specific isometric_bottom_max
Isometric top IT exceeds exercise-specific isometric_top_max
Eccentric duration E below class-based minimum and not a ballistic exception
Tempo contains X in IT or other non-C position (v1.1.1+ restriction)
h_node_effective > 3, exercise does not allow escalation; clamped to H3 with audit trail
h_node_effective exceeds day_role_h_node_max; tempo downgraded via deterministic sequence
Total TUT exceeds MCC TUT ceiling; tempo downgraded
Downgrade sequence exhausted; exercise swap required
Tempo was DCC-legal but modified by MCC context
Downgrade transformation created a tempo that violates Pass 1B constraints; exercise swap required
